g.text: The supporting cast inside every layer
One layer block · two sub-layers · residual arcs
ONE TRANSFORMER LAYER · ENCODER OR DECODER
HOW THEY COMPOSE — APPLIED TO EVERY SUB-LAYER
All sub-layers and embeddings emit dimension d_model = 512 so the residual addition is well-defined.
Source: Vaswani et al. 2017, §3.1 + §3.3 Position-wise Feed-Forward Networks
